name: X-Change Roulette
description: You're playing a dangerous game with your friend Jacob. Twenty-five identical-looking pills lay between you. You'll each take turns taking one - and each pill will transform the person who takes it into a different kind of sexy girl. But one of the pills turns you into a godlike man... and whoever finds that one, gets to have their way with the other. Good luck... or maybe you'd rather have bad luck....
creator: ryanxh
